summary: Iteration 35 - Testing Fixed Pre-Match Prediction Categories: H2H Historical Fallback, Toss Impact, Bowling Depth (Top 5), and Balance. All 10 backend tests passed. All fixes verified working correctly.
passed_tests: RR vs MI H2H uses historical_ipl source with 13-16 record (total=29)
PBKS vs RR H2H uses historical_ipl source with 14-14 record (total=28)
Toss Impact returns non-zero logit_contribution (0.0338 for Mohali night)
Toss Impact toss_win_pct is 0.625 for Mohali night venue
Bowling Depth uses top 5 bowlers only (team1_bowler_count=5, team2_bowler_count=5)
Squad Strength includes balance values (team1_balance=0.99, team2_balance=0.986)
All 8 categories present with weights and logit_contributions
DC vs GT H2H uses historical_ipl source with total=6
critical_code_review_comments: H2H historical fallback correctly implemented in form_service.py with HISTORICAL_H2H dictionary
Toss Impact now returns actual logit based on toss_win_pct (was hardcoded to 0.0 before)
Bowling Depth correctly uses top 5 bowlers only (was using full 25-man squad before)
Balance bonus correctly applied in squad_logit calculation with balance_diff * 3.0
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule and squad data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 complete. All pre-match prediction category fixes verified: (1) H2H now uses historical IPL H2H data when no season data exists (source='historical_ipl'), (2) Toss Impact returns non-zero logit_contribution based on venue-specific toss_win_pct, (3) Bowling Depth uses top 5 bowlers only (bowler_count=5), (4) Balance is reflected in squad_strength factor with team1_balance/team2_balance values. All 8 categories produce meaningful non-zero values.

h2h_historical_fallback.description: H2H uses HISTORICAL_H2H dictionary when no season data exists. RR vs MI: 13-16, PBKS vs RR: 14-14, DC vs GT: 2-4

toss_impact_non_zero.description: Toss Impact returns actual logit based on toss_win_pct. Mohali night: toss_win_pct=0.625, logit_contribution=0.0338

bowling_depth_top5.description: Bowling Depth uses top 5 bowlers only (not full 25-man squad). Both teams show bowler_count=5

balance_in_squad_strength.description: Balance values present in squad_strength factor. team1_balance=0.99, team2_balance=0.986

all_8_categories.description: All 8 categories (squad_strength, current_form, venue_pitch_home, h2h, toss_impact, bowling_depth, conditions, momentum) present with weights and logit_contributions

prediction_probability.description: Prediction returns valid probability between 1-99% with model='8-category-v2'
